scope: narrow canonical docs for admin auth/setup

acceptance_criteria.criterion: AdminCodeStatusController is not accessible without an admin auth/permission boundary.
evidence: Spring Security filter chain protects the admin code-status GET path with authority admin.code-status.read and denies other /api/v1/admin/** paths by default.
AdminCodeStatusControllerIT rejects missing and invalid bearer tokens with 401 sanitized ApiErrorResponse.
AdminCodeStatusControllerIT existing happy-path requests now require Authorization: Bearer test-admin-token.
AdminCodeStatusControllerIT verifies an unknown admin path returns sanitized 403 even with the code-status token.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: OpenAPI exposes the admin security scheme and secured operation responses.
evidence: OpenApiConfig defines adminBearerAuth HTTP bearer scheme.
AdminCodeStatusController documents operation security plus 401/403 sanitized errors.
AdminCodeStatusControllerIT asserts /v3/api-docs contains adminBearerAuth, ADMIN_AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED and ADMIN_PERMISSION_DENIED.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Admin live mode is not switchable by query parameter and uses deploy/env-controlled configuration.
evidence: apps/admin resolves live source only from FINRHYTHM_ADMIN_CODE_STATUS_SOURCE.
apps/admin live fetch requires FINRHYTHM_ADMIN_API_TOKEN and sends Authorization: Bearer token.
apps/admin boundary test asserts code-status-client.ts has no params.mode/first(params.mode) live switch.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Docs and evidence reflect changed auth/setup behavior.
evidence: docs/setup/codex-setup.md documents env-controlled live mode and token requirement.
docs/architecture/repo-layout.md documents env-only live admin baseline.
docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md documents the temporary MVP admin bearer boundary and Mermaid flow.

commands.outcome: blocked by macOS Java stub: Unable to locate a Java Runtime
Focused admin code-status security/OpenAPI integration test passed with Testcontainers PostgreSQL
Full apps/api Maven verify passed with Testcontainers PostgreSQL
No whitespace errors in current diff

openapi_notes: OpenAPI source is updated in apps/api via springdoc annotations and OpenApiConfig.
packages/api-client currently has no generated artifacts/generator in this repo slice; no generated client files were edited.
limitations: Root make verify was not run because this audit slice was limited to apps/api/apps/admin and the worktree contains unrelated concurrent apps/web/stage changes.
